name: Pumpkin Muffins#3
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients.
2. Spray muffin tin with Pam cooking spray.
3. Divide mixture equally among 12 muffin cups.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 25 minutes.
5. Makes 12 muffins. Each serving of six (6) muffins equals:
- 1 Bread Exchange
- 1 Fruit Exchange
- 1 Milk Exchange
- 1 Protein Exchange
- 1/2 Vegetable Exchange
6. This is a no-fat recipe! You may substitute Egg Beaters for the eggs and Equal for the Sweet & Low. These freeze well.
